name: Greek Deviled Eggs with Ouzo
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash egg yolks with ouzo into a smooth paste.
2. Combine parsley, mint, and mayonnaise in a bowl.
3. Blend both mixtures together until smooth.
4. Fill egg whites with the mixture.
5. Garnish with chopped black olives.
The anise-flavored liquor makes these eggs fragrant and delicious.
